name: Coral Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, cream together the butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar until well mixed.
2. Add the vanilla extract and egg to the mixture. Beat until combined.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt into another bowl.
4. Gradually add small amounts of the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix until just combined.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and chopped pecans until evenly distributed.
6. Form the dough into balls about 1-inch in diameter.
7. Refrigerate the dough balls for 30 minutes.
8. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
9. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
10. Place the dough balls on the prepared sheet, spacing them about 1-1/2 inches apart.
11. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges and set in the center.
12. Allow the cookies to cool for 15 minutes before serving. Makes approximately 20 to 24 cookies.
